content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed the diff for milestone command handler enhancements (src/cli/milestone.rs, src/contexts/requirements_drafting/service.rs, tests/cli.rs). The changes add: (1) stale startup reservation detection via PID+timeout, (2) stale drafting run detection via timeout, (3) compatibility validation for pending requirements runs (mode/output_kind), (4) semantic validation of snapshots before actions, (5) pending_requirements view in show/status JSON output, (6) guard against replanning running milestones, (7) proper cleanup on backend setup failures, and (8) draft_milestone_with_run_id for caller-controlled run IDs. All 35 milestone CLI tests pass, clippy is clean with -D warnings, and fmt check passes. The loop recovery in load_or_start_milestone_requirements_run has a one-attempt guard preventing infinite loops. Error handling is thorough — incompatible runs surface clear errors, corrupt state is reported without silent data loss, and stale runs are recovered gracefully. The /proc-based PID check is properly guarded by proc_root.is_dir() for non-Linux portability. No correctness, safety, or robustness issues found.

## Amendments

None.
